types.name: Link

props.name: download
props.hint: string or boolean (triggers file download; string sets the filename)

types.description: Navigation link

types.name: Radio
types.description: Legacy radio group container; prefer RadioField with RadioFieldOption children for new A2UI surfaces

types.description: Preferred radio group rendered with RadioFieldOption children

types.name: Select

types.name: Switch
types.description: Legacy toggle switch; prefer SwitchField for new A2UI surfaces

types.description: Preferred toggle switch field with label, description, and validation error support

types.name: RadioOption
types.description: Legacy individual radio option; prefer RadioFieldOption for new A2UI surfaces

types.description: Preferred individual radio field option with description and validation error support

types.description: Individual option within a Select
